title: microseris oligantha
intro: Microseris oligantha, also known as desert gold, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microseris oligantha include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting skin health. Microseris oligantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its potential benefits.
